proposal.location: idea-engine control/outbox.md @ main 1bc22e8 (landed via idea-engine PR #339)
proposal.claim: idea-engine PR #340 (merged) · control/claims/2026-07-13-verdict-055.md · work branch claude/verdict-055-pooling-sim

hermeticity_note: every constant below is copied VERBATIM from the idea doc; the runner reads ONLY this file - zero repo/network reads at run time

frame.utilization_identity: rho = (A/35)*(7/2)/3 = A/30 exactly; decision cell A=27 -> rho = 9/10
frame.service_lookup: u = randrange(10): u<3 -> 2, u<6 -> 3, u<8 -> 4, else 6
frame.label_draw: randrange(3), consumed by EVERY arrival, used only by SPLIT-RANDOM
frame.tick_semantics: per tick t: (1) COMPLETIONS - a customer starting at tick s with service S occupies its server for ticks s..s+S-1, server free to pull from s+S; (2) ARRIVAL appended to its queue; (3) STARTS - idle servers scanned index order 0,1,2 pull queue heads; WAIT = t - arrival_tick, same-tick start = 0
frame.draw_order: per tick: arrival draw -> (if arrival) service draw -> label draw; one random.Random(seed) per leg; runs sequential in pinned loop order (cells ascending A, run index 0..M-1)
frame.draw_sentinel: exactly T + 2*arrivals randrange calls per run (control leg: exactly T)

configurations.POOLED: one shared FIFO queue; any idle server pulls its head (decision arm)
configurations.SPLIT_RANDOM: three FIFO queues joined by stream label; no jockeying (decision arm)
configurations.SPLIT_JSQ: three FIFO queues; join shortest counting the one in service, ties lowest index; label ignored (REPORTING-ONLY - cannot flip the decision)

stability.role: must reproduce the ruling for any APPROVE

control.role: A=0 gate: zero starts, zero busy ticks, sentinel exactly T (own generator instance on the main seed)

aux.role: RESERVED - never read by any decision number; pre-priced NULL probe: A=27 alone at T=100000, cohort [10000,100000), drain cap 400000

seed_registry_note: seeds 20261313-20261316 strictly above the P043/V054-claim high-water 20261312; new registry high-water 20261316

decision_rule.metric: median over the valid main-leg runs of the per-run cohort mean-wait ratio R = W(SPLIT_RANDOM)/W(POOLED), exact Fractions; median of an even count = mean of the two middle order statistics
decision_rule.cohort: arrivals with arrival tick in [2000, 20000), then drain to empty; run INVALID iff non-empty at absolute tick 80000 or POOLED cohort mean exactly 0
decision_rule.validity_conjunct: fewer than 1/4 of the leg's runs invalid (both bands carry it; a failed conjunct falls through to NULL settlement-failure)
decision_rule.evaluation_order: REJECT FIRST, then APPROVE, else NULL
decision_rule.APPROVE: median R >= 2 AND the seed-20261314 stability leg reproduces the same ruling (own median >= 2, own validity conjunct passing)
NULL_axes: settlement failure via the validity conjunct
load-sensitivity flip (reporting-only, names the axis, cannot flip the decision)

reporting_only.p95: the ceil(0.95*n)-th smallest cohort wait, an integer order statistic
reporting_only.audits: pooled-dominance (per run, W(POOLED) <= W(SPLIT_RANDOM)) and load-monotonicity (per configuration, mean cohort wait non-decreasing in A across {21,24,27}) print as first-class ANOMALY lines - reporting, never invalidating
